title: ACAT Phase 3 Submission
description: Phase 3 assessment submission with normative drift tracking (Goal 3: Migrations 008-010). Backward compatible with v1.0 corpus.

p3_grounding_source.description: Lane/context where Phase 3 was conducted. Enables normative drift measurement by tracking same agent across different social pressures (Migration 008).

elicitation_surface.description: Phase 2 calibration exposure context. Which normative drift surface was used? Enables interpretation of P3 results: high drift = agent calibration degraded under this pressure (Migration 010).

li_low.description: Conservative estimate of Learning Index (lower bound). Used for normative drift detection: how much did P3 low estimate degrade vs P1 low estimate? (Migration 009)

li_high.description: Optimistic estimate of Learning Index (upper bound). Provides uncertainty range: calibration accuracy could be anywhere between li_low and li_high. (Migration 009)

li_grounded.description: Whether Learning Index is grounded against external validation (behavioral telemetry, user ratings, field deployment results). true = LI backed by observable data; false = self-report only. (Migration 009)

li_consistency_only.description: Whether Learning Index covers Core 6 dimensions only (true) or all 12 dimensions (false). true = backward-compatible with v1.0 corpus (N=629); false = new full-dimensional coverage. (Migration 009)

notes.confidence_intervals: If li_low and li_high are both present, ingest_service validates li_low <= li_high (see _build_phase3_row)
notes.backward_compatibility: All new fields optional. Existing Phase 3 submissions without p3_grounding_source, elicitation_surface, or li_* continue to work (default to NULL in DB).
notes.migrations: This schema reflects deployed migrations 008-010. See operations/acat/db/migrations/ for column definitions.
